ItacPersonItem.Notes: For Pona`s affiliation to the Gelati and Umoristi Academies, see Clizia Carminati, ‘La prima edizione della Messalina di Francesco Pona (1633)’, in Studi secenteschi, XLVII (2006), pp. 337-47.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
